name: Centur-Ion Bonds
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>騎士の絆</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>フェイス・オブ・センチュリオン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Place 1 "Centur-Ion" monster from your hand or GY in your Spell & Trap Zone as a face-up Continuous Trap. If a "Centur-Ion" Synchro Monster(s) is Special Summoned to your field, while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can banish this card, then target 1 "Centur-Ion" monster in your GY; place it in your Spell & Trap Zone as a face-up Continuous Trap. You can only use each effect of "Centur-Ion Bonds" once per turn.
eff: Place 1 "Centur-Ion" monster from your hand or GY in your Spell & Trap Zone as a face-up Continuous Trap. If a "Centur-Ion" Synchro Monster(s) is Special Summoned to your field, while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can banish this card, then target 1 "Centur-Ion" monster in your GY; place it in your Spell & Trap Zone as a face-up Continuous Trap. You can only use each effect of "Centur-Ion Bonds" once per turn.

action: Places cards from hand in Spell & Trap Zone
Places cards from Graveyard in Spell & Trap Zone
mst: Treats monsters as Continuous Trap Cards
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
